subtitle.en: Noctiluca and Pyrocystis dinoflagellates emit a single bright flash when sheared; the flash propagates along action-potential lines through the cell, fading in ~150 ms
subtitle.ko: Noctiluca·Pyrocystis가 전단에 단일 섬광 — 활동전위 따라 전파, 150 ms에 사라짐

description.en: Shear-driven bright dot field with threshold (~25 mPa). Time-trace shows the brief ~100 ms pulse. Foundation of historical 'milky seas' phenomena.
description.ko: 전단 구동 밝은 점밭, 임계값(~25 mPa). Time-trace로 ~100 ms 펄스. '우유 바다' 현상 기반.
